Attack_Texts: Your opponent switches his or her Active Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.|
FlavorText: While young, it has six gorgeous tails. When it grows, several new tails are sprouted.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Ember", "cost": ["Fire"], "convertedEnergyCost": 1, "damage": "20", "text": "Flip a coin. If tails, discard a Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon."}]
Attack_Texts: Flip a coin. If tails, discard a Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.
FlavorText: A fire burns inside, so it feels very warm to hug. It launches fireballs of 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit.
Eating a twig fills it with energy, and its roomy ears give vent to air hotter than 390 degrees Fahrenheit.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Epic Splash", "cost": ["Water"], "convertedEnergyCost": 1, "damage": "30", "text": "Flip 2 coins. If either of them is tails, this attack does nothing."}]
Attack_Texts: Flip 2 coins. If either of them is tails, this attack does nothing.
FlavorText: In the distant past, it was somewhat stronger than the horribly weak descendants that exist today.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Fury Strikes", "cost": ["Water"], "convertedEnergyCost": 1, "damage": "10×", "text": "Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads."}]
Attack_Texts: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.
FlavorText: It is small but rough and tough. It won't hesitate to take a bite out of anything that moves.

If heads, the Defending Pokémon can't attack during your opponent's next turn."}, {"name": "Electro Ball", "cost": ["Lightning", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 2, "damage": "30", "text": ""}]
Attack_Texts: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon can't attack during your opponent's next turn.|
FlavorText: It raises its tail to check its surroundings. The tail is sometimes struck by lightning in this pose.
Its skin has a rubbery elasticity, so it can reduce damage by defensively pulling it skin up to its neck.

Attack_Texts: |Discard a Darkness Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.
FlavorText: It captivates foes with its huge, round eyes, then lulls them to sleep by singing a soothing melody.
A proverb claims that happiness will come to anyone who can make a sleeping Togepi stand up.

FlavorText: Its whiskers serve as antennas. By sending and receiving electrical waves, it can communicate with others over vast distances.

Attack_Texts: If this Pokémon has any Darkness Energy attached to it, this attack does 20 more damage.
FlavorText: Adores round objects. It wanders the streets on a nightly basis to look for dropped loose change.

FlavorText: Thanks to its unstable genetic makeup, this special Pokémon conceals many different possible evolutions.
